data.chapter_title_en: Invocations for rising from the Ruki'
data.arabic_text: ((رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ، حَمْداً كَثيراً طَيِّباً مُبارَكاً فِيهِ)).
data.english_text: (Our Lord, for You is all praise, an abundant beautiful blessed praise.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Rabbana walakal-hamdu hamdan katheeran tayyiban mubarakan feeh.)
